news_list.title: Free motorway travel for Songkran to ease trips to Pattaya and across Thailand - Pattaya Mail
news_list.summary:
PATTAYA, Thailand - Department of Highways Thailand -- Thailand's Department of Highways is offering free motorway travel on five major routes during the Songkran holiday, starting April 10, in a move aimed at easing nationwide travel.

Under the "Smart Travel Songkran 2026" campaign, toll fees will be waived for seven days on three key motorways -- M7, M9, and M81 -- from 00:01 on April 10 until midnight on April 16.

In addition, two newer motorways -- M6 and M82 -- will open for free trial use.

The M6 (Bang Pa-in to Nakhon Ratchasima, 196 km) will operate with directional flow management:

The Pak Chong-Nakhon Ratchasima section will remain open both directions throughout

Meanwhile, the M82 (Bang Khun Thian to Ekachai, 10 km) will also be accessible free of charge.

In total, more than 530 kilometers of motorway will be available nationwide at no cost, helping to reduce congestion, cut travel times, and lower fuel consumption during one of Thailand's busiest travel periods.

Officials are urging motorists to check vehicle conditions and plan trips in advance. Travelers can call the Department of Highways hotline 1586 (press 7) for 24-hour assistance or monitor traffic via the M-Traffic app.

news_list.title: Six shuttlers await recognition months after university body's lapse at World University Games
news_list.summary:
New Delhi, April 4: Months after an administrative lapse prevented them from competing at the World University Games, six Indian badminton players are still awaiting participation certificates which were promised to them as corrective action by the Association of Indian Universities (AIU).

A 12-member Indian badminton squad was selected for the Games in Rhine-Ruhr, Germany, but only six players entered the managers' meeting, leaving the remaining half barred from competition despite being present at the venue. The AIU then formed an inquiry committee and suspended its joint secretary, Baljit Singh Sekhon.

The six who competed - Sathish Kumar Karunakaran, Saneeth Dayanand, Tasnim Mir, Varshini Viswanath Sri, Devika Sihag and Vaishnavi Khadkekar - went on to win a historic bronze medal in the mixed team event.

However, the excluded players - Alisha Khan, Rohan Kumar, Darshan Pujari, Aditi Bhatt, Abhinash Mohanty and Viraj Kuvale - were left out of official records, denying them certificates, recognition and benefits linked to international medals.

The Sports Ministry in January this year issued a show cause notice to AIU, saying the body has failed to carry out its duties related to athlete development and planning.

"Cash awards are not there, we haven't given any cash reward to anyone but they have got their medals. They are yet to get the certificates but we took it up with FISU so hope for the best," AIU secretary general Pankaj Mittal said when asked if the six players were recognised.

For the players, the past few months have been marked by uncertainty, with little clarity from the governing body.

Alisha Khan alleged that repeated attempts to seek clarity from officials have drawn no response.

"While we were in Germany, there was a zoom meeting organised by AIU with the players and its general secretary Ms. Pankaj Mittal was present. They promised us that upon returning to India we will get equal recognition and cash rewards and merit certificates like the other 6 players," she said.

"We were told to post on Instagram with our medals to show that because of AIU we received the medals, whereas we as players wrote a letter to FISU and its organisers to understand our situation, so as a memento they gave us the medal.

"Since we have returned to India, not even one email has been answered and no one is ready to pick our calls, even if they pick our calls they just keep on telling us to talk to some other official. We have received no clear response yet. Our state associations are asking for merit certificates to give us cash awards," she added.

Sathish Kumar Karunakaran, who was part of the medal-winning side, said the lack of clarity has been frustrating for all involved.

"They did promise cash awards but everything became silent after that. We tried speaking to them, there was no response," he said.

"We don't have anything in writing, but every player knows it, we know what was promised and what happened there, the struggle we went through. We didn't have T-shirts either.

"It was tough to receive the medals while the rest of our fellow shuttlers were crying on the sideline, we didn't want to get the medals this way but we were threatened." Aditi Bhatt, one of the excluded players, said the absence of official certification has rendered the medals meaningless.

"We were promised certificates that recognised us as part of the bronze medal winning Indian team, we got medals but the value of the medal is zero with the certificate.

"They said once we come back we would be felicitated, we will be recognised, and a cash award, just be there as a team support and we did that but after that there was nothing."

The excluded players were later given medals by the International University Sports Federation as a symbolic gesture, but these do not carry official validity in terms of records or entitlements.

With no outcome of the AIU inquiry in the public domain and no formal recognition extended so far, the players continue to await closure of an episode that cost them a chance to compete on the international stage. (PTI)

news_list.title: How the White House's $100,000 H-1B visa fee is impacting America's ability to attract global talent
news_list.summary:
Hyderabad, India -- The city of Hyderabad has been called the Silicon Valley of India.

"Google, Facebook, and all the other bigger companies are here," Rajesh Jaknalli, who has worked for a U.S. tech company in Hyderabad for about 10 years, told CBS News.

"This place is actually called High Tech City, but because of the many companies that we have, the term 'Cyberabad' has come," Jaknalli explained.

Jaknalli says he has worked here with one goal, to get an opportunity to one day move to the U.S.

"Our dream was to perform, give you 100%, and then probably, we'll get a chance to move to the U.S.," Jaknalli said.

But in September 2025, the Trump administration announced that it would require that a $100,000 fee be added to new applications for H-1B visas for skilled foreign workers. The White House argued the move would protect American jobs.

Prior to this, H-1B visas had ranged in cost from anywhere between $1,700 and $4,500.

Hameed Abdul thought his Amazon job in Hyderabad would eventually take him to the U.S., but that outlook has changed.

"I got this news, and I was really devastated," Abdul said. "...It's not beneficial for any employer, to be honest. Nobody's going to hire you and give $100,000," said Abdul, who disclosed that the fee means he has "decided to move to Canada."

Xavier Fernandes, who founded the immigration agency Y-Axis, says the H-1B visa created a pipeline of tech talent that eventually fueled America's IT sector.

"It's definitely America's loss," Fernandes said of the fee. "...Many CEOs are from Hyderabad. It's just a breeding ground of tech."

According to numbers from U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services, more than 70% of H-1B visa holders in 2024 were Indian.

"Indians are the new oil, coal, or gas, it's brain power to run the modern day industries," Fernandes said.

Pressed on whether he believes that same "brain power" exists in the U.S., Fernandes responded: "That kind of talent you can't manufacture. It's not a thing that you can get it locally."

It's something even President Trump admitted to in an interview on Fox News last November, telling host Laura Ingraham that "you also do have to bring in talent."

When Ingraham countered that the U.S. has "plenty of talented people here," Mr. Trump responded, "No you don't...You don't have certain talents, and people have to learn."

Fernandes believes the new policy "definitely" threatens the trajectory of U.S. innovation.

"Many Indians will stay back and build in India," Fernandes said.

Countries like Canada, China and Australia are now scrambling to lure skilled foreign workers by making their visa processes easier.

"I'm currently applying to Australia," Jaknalli said. "The process is pretty straightforward there."

news_list.title: Herald to host EcoTech Festa highlighting environment as economic value
news_list.summary:
Full-day forum linking climate solutions with economic opportunity will feature global ESG leaders, startup founders

Herald Corp., publisher of The Korea Herald and Herald Business, will host its largest eco-tech gathering of the year at Yonsei University's Baekyangnuri Hall on May 7, bringing together industry leaders, policymakers and students for a full day of discussions on how environmental action is evolving into economic value.

The company said Friday that this year's event, H.EcoTech Festa 2026," aims to help young people prepare for a global market where climate solutions are increasingly tied to growth and competitiveness.

Framed around the theme of a circular economy, where "the environment is money," the forum seeks to reposition environmental challenges as business opportunities rather than cost burdens. Organizers said the program will serve as a platform for students and early-career participants to explore career paths in sustainability-driven industries.

The EcoTech Festa builds on Herald Corp.'s earlier H.eco Forum, launched in 2021, but shifts its focus toward the business ecosystem emerging from the climate transition.

This year, the company has partnered with Eco&Partners Co. as a co-organizer, bringing industry expertise in climate-tech consulting into the program's design and execution.

The program will open with a performance by rapper Raf Sandou, a Yonsei University alumnus who gained wider recognition through "Show Me the Money 12." He will be followed by a keynote lecture by science communicator Orbit, known for explaining complex scientific and environmental issues to broader audiences. Orbit is expected to outline how climate risks can be reframed as catalysts for eco-technology and market innovation.

The first session, which will examine how sustainable ideas can be translated into global business models, will bring together leaders at the forefront of the circular economy. Lee Han-kyung, CEO of Eco&Partners, will moderate the discussion.

Speakers include Kim Hye-sun, head of government affairs, public policy and sustainability compliance for Korea and Japan at HP Inc.; Yang Hee-gyoung, CEO of KARI Corp.; Lee Seung-woo, CEO of 119REO; and Lee Chung-ho, CEO of ReFeed Inc.

The session will explore how sustainable business models are taking shape across industries, with speakers sharing case studies from multinational corporations and resource-circulation startups.

Panelists are expected to highlight emerging entrepreneurial and employment pathways, and how the eco-tech sector can offer viable career opportunities for young professionals.

The second session, titled "Environment as Competitiveness," will shift the focus to career development. It will be moderated by Kim Kwang-woo, a staff reporter at the Herald Business Future Industry Desk, who covers climate and sustainability issues.

The panel will feature Sunny, ESG team lead at Kakao Bank; Jeong Soo-jeong of LG Electronics' ESG Office; Yoon Yong-hee, a partner at Yulchon LLC; and Kim Kyeong-yeon, director of the global strategy division at Eco&Partners.

They will discuss real-world cases showing how environmental value has become a source of professional competitiveness across industries, and how sustainability can help build distinct and durable career advantages.

The event will conclude with a career mentoring program featuring professionals from major domestic and multinational corporations. Participants will engage in small-group sessions with industry leaders to receive tailored advice, practical job insights and guidance on long-term career planning.

tech_topic_heatmap.summary: 科技主題熱度集中在 地緣政治對美元和黃金市場的影響、美國H-1B簽證政策對吸引全球人才的影響、泰國潑水節交通便利措施，主線仍由新聞主題驅動。

topics.summary: 中東局勢的緊張與緩和是影響美元走勢和黃金市場表現的重要因素。

topics.topic: 美國H-1B簽證政策對吸引全球人才的影響
topics.summary: 美國H-1B簽證費用的大幅增加，正迫使印度等國的技術人才轉向加拿大、澳洲等國，對美國吸引全球頂尖人才的能力構成挑戰，並可能影響美國的創新。
evidence: How the White House's $100,000 H-1B visa fee is impacting America's ability to attract global talent
But in September 2025, the Trump administration announced that it would require that a $100,000 fee be added to new applications for H-1B visas for skilled foreign workers.
"It's definitely America's loss," Fernandes said of the fee.
Many Indians will stay back and build in India,"

topics.topic: 泰國潑水節交通便利措施
topics.summary: 為緩解潑水節期間的交通壓力，泰國高速公路部門將在多條主要高速公路上實施免費通行，以減輕民眾出行負擔。
evidence: Free motorway travel for Songkran to ease trips to Pattaya and across Thailand - Pattaya Mail
Thailand's Department of Highways is offering free motorway travel on five major routes during the Songkran holiday, starting April 10, in a move aimed at easing nationwide travel.
Under the "Smart Travel Songkran 2026" campaign, toll fees will be waived for seven days on three key motorways -- M7, M9, and M81 -- from 00:01 on April 10 until midnight on April 16.

topics.topic: 印尼羽毛球運動員因行政失誤導致的證書爭議
topics.summary: 儘管贏得了銅牌，但有六名印度羽毛球運動員因大學體育協會的行政失誤，至今未能獲得世界大學運動會的參賽證明，影響了他們的認可和潛在的獎勵。
evidence: Six shuttlers await recognition months after university body's lapse at World University Games

Months after an administrative lapse prevented them from competing at the World University Games, six Indian badminton players are still awaiting participation certificates which were promised to them as corrective action by the Association of Indian Universities (AIU).

The six who competed - Sathish Kumar Karunakaran, Saneeth Dayanand, Tasnim Mir, Varshini Viswanath Sri, Devika Sihag and Vaishnavi Khadkekar - went on to win a historic bronze medal in the mixed team event.

The excluded players - Alisha Khan, Rohan Kumar, Darshan Pujari, Aditi Bhatt, Abhinash Mohanty and Viraj Kuvale - were left out of official records, denying them certificates, recognition and benefits linked to international medals.

topics.topic: 南韓的生態科技與經濟價值論壇
topics.summary: 韓國將舉辦一場聚焦於環境與經濟價值的生態科技論壇，旨在連結氣候解決方案與經濟機會，並為年輕人探索永續發展產業的職業道路提供平台。
evidence: Herald to host EcoTech Festa highlighting environment as economic value

Herald Corp., publisher of The Korea Herald and Herald Business, will host its largest eco-tech gathering of the year at Yonsei University's Baekyangnuri Hall on May 7, bringing together industry leaders, policymakers and students for a full day of discussions on how environmental action is evolving into economic value.
Framed around the theme of a circular economy, where "the environment is money," the forum seeks to reposition environmental challenges as business opportunities rather than cost burdens.

ai_analysis.full_text:
2026-04-05 (週日) 盤前分析
【今日結論】
週二台股開盤面臨壓力，主因是台積電 ADR 於週三盤後下跌，加上國際油價飆升引發的通膨擔憂，預示著市場將進入避險情緒升高階段。儘管台指期夜盤表現強勁，但 ADR 的負面訊號及原油帶來的宏觀壓力，都將使週二台股的開盤基調偏向保守，低開或震盪格局可能性更高。
【新聞驅動】
國際市場持續受地緣政治緊張與能源價格波動影響。布蘭特原油突破關鍵的 109 美元門檻，暗示著潛在的「需求破壞」與通膨壓力，這也是市場避險情緒升溫的主因。同時，Google 對量子電腦可能威脅加密貨幣安全的警示，為數位資產市場帶來新的不確定性，避險基金的拋售潮也印證了資金流向的變化。
【國際與台股】
美股週三收盤呈現溫和上漲，但台積電 ADR 下跌 0.72% 成為週二台股開盤的重要影響因素。儘管台指期夜盤大漲，但 ADR 的回檔以及換算後仍有的溢價空間，顯示跳空大漲的可能性降低。CNN 恐懼貪婪指數來到 19 (極度恐懼)，加密市場亦偏向恐懼，顯示整體市場情緒低迷。
【KOL與情緒】
市場熱搜關鍵字顯示「油價公告」是關注焦點，反映了投資者對能源價格走勢的擔憂。KOL 觀點雖然多元，但宏爺、游庭皓、股市小黑、張耿益等均點出了美國就業數據、中國鐵礦石定價權以及地緣政治等重要議題，這些都與當前市場的宏觀風險相互呼應，預示著操作上需更加謹慎。
【操作含意】
鑒於原油價格飆升帶來的通膨與經濟擔憂，以及台積電 ADR 下跌的壓力，週二台股操作應以謹慎為主。市場避險情緒可能升溫，關注油價後續走勢及地緣政治動態，留意資金流向是否有明顯轉向避險資產的跡象。操作上建議避開高波動題材，並以防禦性佈局為宜。

selected_charts.title: 美股與風險資產
selected_charts.description: S&P 500、Nasdaq、SOX、VIX 與美元、黃金、原油的跨資產訊號。
selected_charts.takeaway: 儘管 S&P 500 和 Nasdaq 近期上漲，但 Nasdaq 期貨和台積電 ADR 的下跌，加上 VIX 的回落，顯示市場短期內存在一些觀望情緒，避險需求可能正在抬頭。
selected_charts.action: 關注台積電 ADR 的走勢，及其對台股的潛在影響。

selected_charts.title: 商品風險走勢
selected_charts.description: 布蘭特原油、黃金與美元指數的通膨與避險訊號。
selected_charts.takeaway: 布蘭特原油價格的急劇上漲是本週最顯著的市場事件之一，這與黃金價格下跌和美元指數上漲的組合，明確顯示了市場避險情緒的升高和對通膨的擔憂。
selected_charts.action: 將原油價格視為觀察市場通膨預期和避險情緒的重要指標。

selected_charts.title: 美債殖利率與油價
selected_charts.description: 美國 10 年期公債殖利率與原油價格的通膨與定價訊號。
selected_charts.takeaway: 美國 10 年期公債殖利率的下跌與原油價格的上漲同時出現，這可能表明市場正在權衡未來的通膨壓力，並重新定價風險資產。
selected_charts.action: 留意公債殖利率與原油價格的背離現象，分析其對市場預期的影響。

selected_charts.title: 美股分析師共識圖
selected_charts.description: Seeking Alpha 的 Quant、作者與華爾街評級共識，搭配多頭/空頭強弱排序。
selected_charts.takeaway: Seeking Alpha 的分析師共識為投資者提供了關於 Mag 7 股票的潛在投資方向，TSLA 的強勁共識值得關注，而 AMZN 的相對弱勢則需進一步分析。
selected_charts.action: 參考分析師共識，但仍需結合其他指標進行綜合判斷。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 儘管 S&P 500 和 Nasdaq 近期上漲，但 Nasdaq 期貨和台積電 ADR 的下跌，加上 VIX 的回落，顯示市場短期內存在一些觀望情緒，避險需求可能正在抬頭。
chart_commentary.action: 關注台積電 ADR 的走勢，及其對台股的潛在影響。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 布蘭特原油價格的急劇上漲是本週最顯著的市場事件之一，這與黃金價格下跌和美元指數上漲的組合，明確顯示了市場避險情緒的升高和對通膨的擔憂。
chart_commentary.action: 將原油價格視為觀察市場通膨預期和避險情緒的重要指標。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 美國 10 年期公債殖利率的下跌與原油價格的上漲同時出現，這可能表明市場正在權衡未來的通膨壓力，並重新定價風險資產。
chart_commentary.action: 留意公債殖利率與原油價格的背離現象，分析其對市場預期的影響。

chart_commentary.takeaway: Seeking Alpha 的分析師共識為投資者提供了關於 Mag 7 股票的潛在投資方向，TSLA 的強勁共識值得關注，而 AMZN 的相對弱勢則需進一步分析。
chart_commentary.action: 參考分析師共識，但仍需結合其他指標進行綜合判斷。

chart_orchestration.overall_summary: 本週市場主線聚焦在國際原油價格的劇烈波動及其引發的通膨擔憂，地緣政治緊張局勢持續影響市場情緒，並推升了避險資產的需求。儘管美股主要指數表現強勁，但 Nasdaq 期貨和台積電 ADR 的疲軟，以及 VIX 的回落，顯示市場情緒有所分歧。科技主題方面，熱點集中在宏觀經濟和政策層面，而非純粹的技術創新。Seeking Alpha 的分析師共識顯示 Mag 7 股票中 TSLA 的評級最強，NVDA、META、GOOGL 也受到較多關注。

news_themes.label: 原油價格飆升引發通膨擔憂與市場避險情緒升溫
news_themes.summary: 布蘭特原油價格大幅飆升，突破關鍵的 109 美元門檻，這預示著潛在的「需求破壞」與通膨壓力，是市場避險情緒升溫的主要原因。黃金價格下跌，美元指數上漲，也印證了市場避險偏好的轉移。

news_themes.label: 地緣政治影響與資產輪動
news_themes.summary: 地緣政治緊張局勢持續影響市場，特別是中東局勢的緩和或緊張，是影響美元走勢和黃金市場表現的重要因素。市場資金可能因此在風險資產與避險資產之間進行輪動。
evidence: 地緣政治對美元和黃金市場的影響
中東局勢的緊張與緩和是影響美元走勢和黃金市場表現的重要因素。

news_themes.label: 美國簽證政策與全球人才流動
news_themes.summary: 美國H-1B簽證費用大幅增加，可能導致印度等國的技術人才轉向加拿大、澳洲等地，對美國吸引全球頂尖人才的能力構成挑戰，並可能影響美國的創新。
evidence: 美國H-1B簽證政策對吸引全球人才的影響

news_themes.label: 美股分析師共識：TSLA 獲較強關注
news_themes.summary: Seeking Alpha 的分析師共識顯示，在 Magnificent 7 股票中，TSLA 獲得的共識評級最高，其他如 NVDA、META、GOOGL 也獲得較高的評級，而 AMZN 的共識相對較弱。
evidence: Seeking Alpha 目前覆蓋 7 檔 Mag 7，共識較強的是 TSLA，相對偏弱的是 AMZN。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 儘管 AI 總結中提到台積電 ADR 下跌可能影響週二台股開盤，但缺乏台股實際走勢和廣度的圖表，無法直接判斷台股的即時市場情緒和支撐壓力。
data_needed: 市場廣度指標 (漲跌家數、漲跌停比例)
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: AI 總結提到『週二台股開盤面臨壓力，主因是台積電 ADR 於週三盤後下跌』，但未提供台股本身的即時數據。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 本週市場主線聚焦在原油價格和通膨擔憂，以及地緣政治影響，但缺乏具體的族群輪動數據，無法判斷資金流向哪些族群，以及市場的熱點是否已轉移。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: AI 總結和新聞主題都強調了原油和地緣政治，但缺乏對台股族群輪動的具體分析。
